title: Dynabeads Wastewater Virus Enrichment & Total Nucleic Acid Extraction
author: Victor Mabasa

steps.title: Set up and label your plates...
steps.instruction: Set up and label your plates according to the following table: Plate Name Plate type Contents Vol per well 1 Sample plate 1 24 deep-well Clarified supernatant 5 000 μL 2 Dynabeads 100 μL 3 Sample plate 2 24 deep-well Clarified supernatant 5 000 μL 4 Lysis buffer 24 deep-well Lysis buffer 500 μL 5 Tip comb 24 deep-well tip comb Not applicable

steps.title: Select the appropriate program on the instrument (Wastewater_10mL_Virus_Isolation)
steps.instruction: Select the appropriate program on the instrument (Wastewater_10mL_Virus_Isolation)

steps.title: Start the run, then load the...
steps.instruction: Start the run, then load the prepared sample and processing plates into position when prompted by the instrument

steps.title: While the instrument is running, set...
steps.instruction: While the instrument is running, set up the nucleic acid extraction plates

steps.title: Plate name Plate type Component Vol...
steps.instruction: Plate name Plate type Component Vol per well 1 Wash Buffer 1 24 deep-well Wash Buffer 1 000 µL 2 Wash Buffer 2 24 deep-well 80% Ethanol 1 000 µL 3 Elution 24 deep-well Elution Solution 100 µL 4 Tip Comb 24 deep-well tip comb

steps.title: Set up and label the Wash,...
steps.instruction: Set up and label the Wash, Elution and Tip Comb plates outside of the instrument according to the following table:

steps.title: When the enrichment process is complete...
steps.instruction: When the enrichment process is complete (approximately 20 minutes after starting the run), remove the lysis plate from the instrument and store it safely for nucleic acid extraction. Discard the remaining plates from the instrument

steps.title: Add 40 μL of Proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Add 40 μL of Proteinase K to each enriched sample in the lysis plate

steps.title: Invert the Binding Bead Mix tube...
steps.instruction: Invert the Binding Bead Mix tube several times to fully resuspend the beads, then add 520 μL to each sample in the lysis plate

steps.title: Load the lysis plate along with...
steps.instruction: Load the lysis plate along with Wash 1, Wash 2, Elution, and a new tip comb. Start the run on the instrument and select the appropriate programme (Wastewater_10mL_Virus_Extraction)

steps.title: Immediately remove the Elution plate from...
steps.instruction: Immediately remove the Elution plate from the instrument at the end of the run and cover it. Alternatively, transfer the eluate to a new tube or plate for final storage. The isolated nucleic acid is ready for immediate use. For storage, keep it at –20°C for up to 6 months or at –80°C for longer than 6 months.

steps.title: Follow the manufacturer's protocol available here
steps.instruction: Follow the manufacturer's protocol available here: https://assets.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/MAN0025695_MM_Wastewater_Ultra_NA_Isol_Kit_10mL_UG.pdf
